title: aellenia iliensis
intro: Aellenia iliensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Aellenia iliensis has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
